menu.title: DARKLINE — First Island Chain
brief.title: Briefing
brief.body: 1953. The ink on the ceasefire is barely dry, yet the island chain only pulls tighter. You are Lin Yi — a logistics consultant by his business card, running the errands that never reach West-Marches Trading Co.'s ledgers.
brief.body2: Tonight someone means to hand off the "Darkline roster" — a double-dealing defector, a martyr's words tattooed across his back, holding every name we keep in the cold. Break the handoff and bring the list home. The North is hunting it too. Don't let it reach the water.
decode.title: Decode Cable
decode.needkey: No cipher key — find what the contact left in the alley first.
decode.clue: The cable opens up: the handoff is at Pier 3, the midnight watch — and the North has put a price on every name. The last line isn't about tonight: "If the line is cut, reconnect along the old net, await no order." The old net… some lines are buried precisely to wake decades later.
scrap.title: Dead Drop
scrap.body:
Behind the loose brick in the corner, a scrap in Old Zhou's hand, oil still on the edge:
"Same key as ever — cipher {c} is plain {p}. Set that one, the rest opens itself."
card.dropoff.title: The Drop-off
card.dropoff.body: The headlights die at the alley mouth. The rain has just stopped; the arcade still drips, and the neon cuts the puddles into squares of red. The roster's shadow is pressed somewhere down this lane.
card.embark.title: To the Docks
card.embark.body: The packet is in hand, the wax still warm. A ship's horn draws out, far off — she's about to sail. Follow that band of light at the alley's end and move; the docks will tell the truth.
free.exit: Head for the docks (reach the end of the alley)
ending.title: Mission Complete
ending.body: The roster is back where it belongs. The defector went down into the harbor, tattoo and all. Tonight, not a single name fell into Northern hands.
ending.body2: But every name is a darkline, and every line gets pulled again in time. When the First Island Chain draws tight once more — we will meet again.
over.title: Mission Failed
over.body: The line is cut. The roster is in Northern hands.
over.retry: (Press R to retry from the last checkpoint)
holding.title: DARKLINE
holding.body: Taipei, 1953 — best experienced in a desktop browser.
holding.rotate: (Rotate to landscape, or open on desktop)
